stemHtml: What is the best course of action when dealing with stress?

options.a: The captain of a long-haul flight notices the first officer is stressed and removes them from the flight deck, replacing them with a positioning crew member.
options.b: The pilot of a single-engine piston aircraft feels stressed and asks a passenger to help operate the aircraft.
options.c: The captain feels stressed and attempts to continue the flight alone without involving the rest of the crew.
options.d: The captain recognizes they are stressed and makes use of all available resources.
